text.title: shadcn/ui Architecture Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Next.js SaaS shadcn rollout
example.note: primitive_dir=src/components/ui/; token_source=src/styles/globals.css (--background, --foreground, --primary, --destructive, --muted, --accent); variant_policy max=6 + compoundVariants=true; lint_rules=[no-arbitrary-tailwind, no-business-import-in-ui, require-forwardRef, require-displayName]; codeowners_path '/components/ui/ @design-system'; asChild_required=true. Feature team wanted to add 'cart-bound' variant - rejected at PR; created CartButton wrapper composing primitive Button + business state instead.

example.title: Variant-explosion rebuild
example.note: Button accumulated 14 variants (primary, secondary, outline, ghost, link, destructive, success, warning, info, brand, brand-soft, brand-strong, soft, soft-link). Tree caught: variant-explosion → refactor to 5 variants + compoundVariants for size/state combos; visual regression suite reduced from 78 to 22 screenshots.
